docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED JAN-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BIG DADDY'S ANTIQUES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL ZIMMERMAN--MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2013 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BIG DADDY'S ANTIQUES
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE QUEENA HO FILED BY GRIFFIN, DENISE BIG DADDY'S ANTIQUES MINIELLO, CHRIS DBA MINIELLO DESIGN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRIFFIN, DENISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIG DADDY'S ANTIQUES $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,185.00, DEFENDANT CHRIS MINIELLO SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF DENISE GRIFFIN $-0-. DEFENDANT BIG DADDY'S ANTIQUES SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GRIFFIN, DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT BIG DADDY'S ANTIQUES MINIELLO, CHRIS DBA MINIELLO DESIGN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
